title: dianthus superbus subsp. longicalycinus
intro: Dianthus superbus subsp. longicalycinus, also known as the Chinese pink or large-flowered pink, is a perennial plant belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Dianthus superbus subsp. longicalycinus include relieving symptoms of fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, as well as possessing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be dried and used in capsules or as a tincture.
